_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of learning management system (LMS) systems and software
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles, including golden record construction, data domain definition, MDM hub architectures, and stewardship workflows.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Knowledge DQ-K-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.477), OP-K-004 (OP, cosine: 0.463).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.399). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, management]. NICE-only terms [learning, lms, software, system, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectures, construction, data, definition, domain, golden] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.900, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the NICE element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:79.6%, C:20.3%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of learning management system (LMS) systems and software" vs "Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles, including golden record co" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.494 > STS 0.399 (gap +0.095). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, management]. NICE-only: [learning, lms, software, system, systems]. WIDAI-only: [architectures, construction, data, definition, domain, golden].
